subcodes.first_line: The days that were inscribed in the divine Books aforetime have become manifest and evident, and the Morn of Revelation hath dawned from the horizon of divine Will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایامیکه در کتب الهیه از قبل مسطور بود ظاهر و مشهود و صبح ظهور از افق اراده
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution
